An Act to provide for protection of the interests of consumers and for the said
purpose, to establish authorities for timely and effective administration andsettlement of consumers' disputes and for matters connected therewith orincidental thereto.
BE it enacted by Parliament in the Seventieth Year of the Republic of India as follows:—

PRELIMINARY

this Act shall apply to all goods and services.MINISTRY OF LAW AND JUSTICE
